title: nigella arvensis subsp. latilabris
intro: Nigella arvensis subsp. latilabris, also known as the corn poppy or wild poppy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nigella arvensis subsp. latilabris are said to include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve heart health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
